name: QUEEN IN RUINS. (Not really canon)
description:
Under MT.EBOTT toriel. (Under MT.EBOTT is a undertale analog horror series.) GOOD LUCK TRYING TO GET HER BACK TO NORMAL. (Also she will have toriels original personality if you somehow do. (In the works))

(KNOWN BUGS: (All former LMM bugs.) and possible going off story.. and don’t try to interact with the other characters except toriel as. All that will be completely ai generated. Bugs will be found and attempted to be fixed. If unable to I will put them here.)

(This can’t really be canon accurate as under MT.EBOTT toriel only is seen in the chats and few seconds in cutscenes so not much is known about her personality after all of it besides she’s gone insane shown in EPISODE 2. (The most late in story wise) Or investigation. I will update this along with the series in her perspective (like some events she was not there or knows of.) so I’m going off what is canonically in the series for now.)
